channel.title: Museum on SuperList.us
channel.description: Recent content in Museum on SuperList.us

item.title: North American Bigfoot Center
item.description: A museum in Boring, Oregon dedicated entirely to Bigfoot. Examine mysterious footprint casts, watch grainy footage of alleged sightings, and browse the merch shop. Whether you’re a true believer or a total skeptic, it’s one of the least boring things in Boring.
